last_next_action.reason: execution queue is empty; wake the agent to synthesize or update the research agenda and advance all currently runnable safe project work from objective, evidence, human advice, and safety policy

recent_evidence.summary: c02 CPMG N=8 four-of-five autosave sanity review: Bridge-free review of the running CPMG N=8 weak-13C discriminator at 5/12 averages. The autosave had 5 saved averages; the first 4 were used for snake-order balance (200k/600k planned shots per point). Bridge stayed healthy/running with Final about 44.086 kcps, monitor active/no error, and stop_requested=false. No drift flags. First-4 combined readout3/self-baseline was 0.9908 near 0.650 us and 0.9971 near 1.300 us, so there is no robust target-tau dip in this nonterminal subset; no 13C claim or rejection.

Bridge-free six-average autosave review of running CPMG N=8 job nv23_cpmg_20260515_072306_auto_cpmg. The bridge remained running/healthy at 6/12 averages with Final about 44.086 kcps, queued/staging empty, monitor active/no last_error, and stop_requested=false; no queue mutation. Raw export verified CPMG.xml, tau 0.45..1.60 us, 37 points, six saved averages x 50000 reps, snake scan order, and do_adiabatic_inversion=0. Six averages are an even snake-order-balanced subset (300k/600k planned shots per point). Scan-order-aware drift used Scan.ScanOrderEachAvg / snake mode and found no flagged averages. Combined readout3/self-baseline was 0.9850 near the 0.650 us target and 0.9947 near the 1.300 us target; no robust target-tau dip, and no 13C claim or rejection from this nonterminal subset.

last_human_request.preview: Objective: Find a magnetic-field-aligned NV from image172647, then obtain a well-supported T2star and 13C conclusion. Start a project using the spatial range of <MATLAB_23C_ROOT>\SavedImages\3DXYZ-Image-2026-05-14-172647.mat as the initial search region. Identify an NV aligned to the magnetic field within that image range; if none is found, search different regions. Judge magnetic-field alignment using a strong-pi pulsed ODMR scan; if it does not show a clear usable resonance, reject
